name: Exquisite Lemon Cake
recipeInstructions:
Cream the shortening and sugar together; add eggs one at a time, beating well.
Slowly mix in milk and vanilla extract.
Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together. Gradually add to shortening mixture, beating well after each addition.
Pour into two greased and floured 8-inch pans. Bake in preheated 350°F oven for 30-35 minutes.
Cool in the pans for 10 minutes; turn cake onto racks to cool for 30 more minutes.
Filling:
Melt butter in a double boiler, then stir in sugar and salt. Add lemon rind and juice. Stir in beaten eggs slowly. Cook over moderate heat until thick, stirring constantly.
Cool before spreading between layers of the cake and on top and sides. This filling is not thick and will not completely cover the cake but you will love the taste!
